name: wassupbro
description: A beautiful desktop Markdown viewer built with Tauri

scripts.build: tauri build && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const nsisDir = './src-tauri/target/release/bundle/nsis'; const files = fs.readdirSync(nsisDir); const setupFile = files.find(f => f.endsWith('-setup.exe')); if (setupFile) { fs.copyFileSync(path.join(nsisDir, setupFile), './dist/MD Viewer Setup.exe'); } fs.copyFileSync('./src-tauri/target/release/app.exe', './dist/MD Viewer.exe')"
scripts.dist: tauri build && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const nsisDir = './src-tauri/target/release/bundle/nsis'; const files = fs.readdirSync(nsisDir); const setupFile = files.find(f => f.endsWith('-setup.exe')); if (setupFile) { fs.copyFileSync(path.join(nsisDir, setupFile), './dist/MD Viewer Setup.exe'); } fs.copyFileSync('./src-tauri/target/release/app.exe', './dist/MD Viewer.exe')"

author: wassupbro
